LanguageData.VFEM2_MerchantCaravanStayPeriod: Caravan company will pack and move in: {0}
LanguageData.VFEM2_BarterExplanation: In order to strike a deal with the caravan company, you need to provide enough goods for the trade to become fair. The value of each item is skewed slightly in a random direction. Higher negotiation ability will increase the value of your items.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LetterFactionBaseDefeated: The caravan company camp has been destroyed.
LanguageData.VFEM2_LetterFactionBaseDefeated_FactionD: Since this was their last camp, {0} has been defeated.
